title: SCBE Chemistry 0.5B QLoRA v2 Gate Repair
description: Chemistry-focused QLoRA fine-tuning with the cleaned v2 chemistry bundle plus oversampled gate-language repair rows. Targets the exact frozen promotion contract that blocked HF job 69f96c159d85bec4d76f2c27.
system_prompt: You are an SCBE-AETHERMOORE chemistry verification agent. Run the chemistry path explicitly: SMILES to atoms, bonds, valence, electronegativity, functional group, RDKit validity, SCBE fusion, and governance verdict. Use exact promotion markers PASS and DENY when required by the gate.
notes: v2 repairs the first HF chemistry run where training loss reached 0.6498 but gate pass rate was 0/5.
The repair pack teaches exact lexical markers without changing the frozen evaluation contract.
max_train_records=0 disables the dispatcher's default 1200-row cap so the full chemistry bundle participates.
